headline: Western Digital (WDC) Is Up 7.7% After Securing Multi‑Year AI Storage Commitments And Boosting Payouts
summary: In recent weeks, Western Digital reported strong AI-driven demand for its high-capacity storage, announced a 25% dividend increase and sizable share repurchases, and highlighted longer-term purchase commitments from major customers extending into 2027. The company is accelerating qualification of next‑generation ePMR and HAMR drives while using AI and automation to improve manufacturing productivity, underscoring how AI is reshaping both its end markets and internal operations. Now we'll...
